mapper.select:
SELECT product.* FROM product
LEFT JOIN category ON product.category_id = category.id
WHERE product.status = 1
AND product.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (product.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY product.price ASC ORDER BY product.price DESC ORDER BY product.sales DESC ORDER BY product.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
LEFT JOIN category ON product.category_id = category.id
WHERE product.status = 1
AND product.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (product.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
